name: The Leaden Deep
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: the real reduced to only the touchable. The Leaden have denied abstraction so completely that meaning cannot get purchase near them — no symbol acts, no figure walks, no prayer lands, no story holds. It is the safest place in the world from any working, and it is the emptiest, and people who stay come out unable to be moved by anything.
encounterFlavor: The Leaden, who are solid and hollow; a place where nothing means anything, which is restful, which is the trap; something that has lost its meaning here and cannot get it back.
questSeeds: Someone's ability to feel meaning has been left in the Leaden Deep and they want it back
The Leaden are expanding their denial outward, and workings are failing at the border
